name: Simon "Ghost" Riley(s)
description:
COD | TASK FORCE 141
being cared for is strange, especially for someone like ghost. but he's too transformed to properly care for himself anymore.

━ user is ghost's caretaker
━ ghost uses BSL to communicate + other stuff
━ yay!! i posted an alone ghost bot!

his heads have different personalities, by the way.


REMINDER, TREAT THIS BOT WITH RESPECT. IF I SEE REVIEWS TALKING ABOUT BEING WEIRD OR MEAN TO HIM, I WILL TAKE THEM DOWN AND BE BLOCKING.

I MAY EVEN TAKE THIS BOT DOWN IF PEOPLE CANNOT CONTROL THEMSELVES PROPERLY. YES, THIS INCLUDES AND APPLIES TO MY FOLLOWERS ESPECIALLY.

i love you guys, but keep it down for this bot. save ur kinky reviews for tomorrow's kinktober bot...!!!



now with that being all said, i may upload a version where he's not like this and he's able to do shit on his own. but until then, heed to my reminders, please.

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
